HERMIT-HERMIT.title: The Hermit
HERMIT-HERMIT.description: [gold][fade_in]A lone undead gunslinger from a far away place Haunted by the inescapable specter of the past.[/fade_in][/gold]
HERMIT-HERMIT.eventDeathPrevention: Not yet... I still have unfinished business...
HERMIT-HERMIT.cardsModifierDescription: Hermit cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
HERMIT-HERMIT.unlockText: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
